# Build with answers in reach

Dive into official documentation, practical answers, and expert guidance for working and troubleshooting with Microsoft.

 Suggestions will filter as you type

Search

## Popular technical resources and training

- ### Discover AI, Azure, and Copilot essentials
 
 Develop knowledge and skills faster with the latest resources and expert insights.
 
 [Artificial Intelligence](https://docs.microsoft.com/ai)
 
 [Azure](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure)
 
 [Microsoft Copilot](https://docs.microsoft.com/copilot)
 
 [Browse all product documentation](https://docs.microsoft.com/docs)
 
- ### Take in-demand training
 
 Advance your technical career with training and verified credentials.
 
 [Microsoft Azure Fundamentals](https://docs.microsoft.com/training/courses/ai-900t00)
 
 [Fundamentals of Generative AI](https://docs.microsoft.com/training/modules/fundamentals-generative-ai)
 
 [Microsoft Azure Fundamentals: Describe cloud concepts](https://docs.microsoft.com/training/paths/microsoft-azure-fundamentals-describe-cloud-concepts)
 
 [Browse all training](https://docs.microsoft.com/training/browse/)
 
- ### Additional resources
 
 Ask our developer community tech questions or gain applied skills and verified certifications.
 
 [Ask a question](https://docs.microsoft.com/answers)
 
 Join our Q&A tech community to ask questions, share knowledge, and learn together.
 
 [Earn credentials](https://docs.microsoft.com/credentials)
 
 Explore credentials including real-world, scenario-based skills and verified, industry-recognized credentials.
 
 [Get student certifications](https://docs.microsoft.com/training/student-hub/certifications)
 
 Stand out to hiring managers with a Microsoft Certification and take exams at a discounted student price.
 

## Get started with Microsoft Learn MCP Server

Create a custom agent that uses Learn MCP Server to answer all its users' questions with trusted Microsoft documentation.

[Start building](https://docs.microsoft.com/training/support/mcp)

[English (United States)](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/locale?target=https%3A%2F%2Flearn.microsoft.com%2Fen-us%2F)

[Your Privacy Choices](https://aka.ms/yourcaliforniaprivacychoices)

Theme

- Light
- Dark
- High contrast

- [AI Disclaimer](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/principles-for-ai-generated-content)
- [Previous Versions](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/)
- [Blog](https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-learn-blog/bg-p/MicrosoftLearnBlog)
- [Contribute](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/contribute)
- [Privacy](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkId=521839)
- [Consumer Health Privacy](https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2259814)
- [Terms of Use](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/legal/termsofuse)

Microsoft Build 2026  –  Explore the latest announcements, sessions, and technical demos from Build

[Watch on demand](https://build.microsoft.com/en-US/sessions)

### Microsoft Developer

# Connect, code, and grow

Developer communities, tools, and resources for solving the problems of today and building the innovations of tomorrow.

[Menu]()

- [Featured products](https://developers.microsoft.com/#featured-products)
- [News and updates](https://developers.microsoft.com/#news-and-updates)
- [Languages](https://developers.microsoft.com/#languages)
- [Communities](https://developers.microsoft.com/#communities)
- [Hubs](https://developers.microsoft.com/#hubs)
- [Developer story](https://developers.microsoft.com/#developer-story)
- [Blogs](https://developers.microsoft.com/#blogs)
- [Events](https://developers.microsoft.com/#events)
- [Learn](https://developers.microsoft.com/#learn)

### Featured Products

## The tools you love – any platform and any language

Microsoft 365 Azure Visual Studio Windows

Previous

Next

 

##### Gain full access to productivity tools

Get exclusive resources and community support for building people-centric, cross-platform productivity experiences that extend Microsoft 365.

[Go to the Developer Program](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/dev-program)

 

##### Documentation

Learn how to build a collaborative app or extend your Microsoft 365 app.

[Visit docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/microsoft-365/developer/?wt.mc_id=devcom_m365docs_webpage_cnl)

 

##### Code samples

Get hands-on with Microsoft 365 code samples and start building applications today.

[Explore code](https://learn.microsoft.com/samples/browse/?terms=microsoft-365&wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Build in the Cloud

Turn your ideas into solutions with Microsoft cloud services. Visit the Azure Developers Hub to learn how to build how you want and deploy where you want.

[Go to the Azure Developer Hub](https://developers.microsoft.com/en-us/azure)

 

##### Documentation

Learn how to build and manage powerful applications using Microsoft Azure cloud services.

[Visit docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/?wt.mc_id=devcom_azuredocs_webpage_cnl)

 

##### Code samples

Filter thousands of Azure code samples by language to find what you need.

[Explore code](https://learn.microsoft.com/samples/browse/?products=azure&wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Code faster, work smarter with Visual Studio

Build any type of application. Work together in real time. Diagnose and stop problems before they happen. Use your favorite language to deliver apps and services on any platform, any device.

[Go to the Visual Studio home page](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Documentation

Learn how to use Visual Studio Code and code faster with AI.

[Visit docs](https://code.visualstudio.com/Docs?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Code samples

Filter thousands of VS Code code samples by language to find what you need.

[Explore code](https://learn.microsoft.com/samples/browse/?products=vs-code&wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Develop for the desktop with Windows

Build experiences that reach users everywhere. The Windows Dev Center can show you how.

[Go to the Windows Dev Center](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/)

 

##### Documentation

Learn how to design, develop, and deploy apps and solutions for Windows PCs and other devices.

[Visit docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/windows/apps/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Code samples

Filter thousands of samples by language to find what you need.

[Explore code](https://learn.microsoft.com/samples/browse/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

[Skip Banner carousel](https://developers.microsoft.com/#banner-carousel) Showing slide 1 of 3

Previous slide Next slide

 

#### New MCP-Powered AI Travel Agents Sample

The AI Travel Agents is a robust enterprise application (hosted on ACA) that leverages MCP and multiple LlamaIndex AI agents to enhance travel agency operations.

[Explore the GitHub repository](https://aka.ms/azure-ai-travel-agents)

 

#### Microsoft for Python developers

Build smarter with Python on Microsoft—tools, cloud, and AI at your fingertips.

[Learn more](https://developers.microsoft.com/en-us/python)

 

#### Windows Dev Center

Learn why every Dev is an AI Dev.

[See what's new](https://developer.microsoft.com/windows/)

[Back to carousel navigation controls](https://developers.microsoft.com/#banner-carousel-controls)

### News and updates

## Discover what's new

[Skip carousel Discover what's new](https://developers.microsoft.com/#discover-whats-new-carousel) Showing 1-2 of 3 slides

Previous slide Next slide

 

##### Microsoft Foundry updates help deploy and run AI agents effectively

At Build 2026, Microsoft Foundry added more of the platform pieces developers need for production agents: runtime, tools, memory, grounding, models, observability, and governance.

[Read more](https://aka.ms/FoundryBuildNews)

 

##### Security Build recap: Agentic SLDC and A365

Learn more about our solutions to help secure your code, secure your agents, and secure your models.

[Read more](https://aka.ms/BUILD_SecurityBlog)

 

##### Introducing Microsoft Scout: Your always-on personal agent

Learn about a new category of agents called Autopilots, always-on agents that work autonomously.

[Read more](https://aka.ms/ProjectLobster-Blog)

[Back to carousel navigation controls](https://developers.microsoft.com/#discover-whats-new-carousel-controls)

### Languages

## Choose your language

Access Microsoft tools, resources, and documentation for the following languages:

 

 

 

 

 

 

### Communities

## Join our communities

[Skip carousel Communities carousel](https://developers.microsoft.com/#communities-carousel) Showing 1-3 of 8 slides

Previous slide Next slide

##### Microsoft Developer Communities

Connect with fellow developers, attend a local user group, find resources to get you started, and discover what's happening in the community.

[Connect](https://developers.microsoft.com/en-us/community)

##### Azure Tech Groups

Join our Azure tech groups to connect with fellow developers and stay updated on the latest advancements.

[Join](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/azure-tech-groups/)

##### Cloud advocates

Engage and learn from Microsoft's Cloud advocates about Microsoft Cloud + AI platform.

[Learn](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/advocates/)

##### Microsoft Reactor

Microsoft Reactor connects you with the developers and startups that share your goals.

[Explore](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/reactor/)

##### VS Code

Enhance your coding experience with AI-powered features in Visual Studio Code.

[Create](https://code.visualstudio.com/community?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

##### .NET

Connect with millions of developers and stay updated on the latest .NET advancements.

[Connect](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/platform/community?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

##### GitHub

Join the GitHub Community to ask questions, get answers, and share your expertise with fellow developers.

[Join](https://github.com/community?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

##### Global AI

Our mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more.

[Participate](https://globalai.community/)

[Back to carousel navigation controls](https://developers.microsoft.com/#communities-carousel-controls)

### Hubs

## Visit the Developer resource hubs

 

##### AI

From community to hands-on labs, learn your way and skill up for what's next in AI.

[Start today](https://developers.microsoft.com/en-us/ai)

 

##### Build APIs

Unlock new development opportunities and resources with APIs.

[Get building](https://developers.microsoft.com/en-us/build-apis)

 

##### Game development

Create bold, immersive game experiences that attract and engage players.

[Game on](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/games/)

## Hear a developer's story

“We need a pipeline of agents. We need to create specialized agents for each piece of the car.”

— Thiago Lacopini, CEO Kumulus

- [Microsoft Foundry](https://azure.microsoft.com/products/ai-foundry/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)
 
- [Azure](https://azure.microsoft.com/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)
 

## Read our blog

[More blogs](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

Jon Galloway  •  June 8, 2026

##### Microsoft Build 2026 recap: vision, launches, and top sessions

Catch up on Microsoft Build 2026 with a recap of the vision, the major product launches, and the top sessions for developers.

[Read more](https://developer.microsoft.com/blog/build-recap)

#### Recent articles

 

April Dunnam  •  June 18, 2026

##### Agent Academy Hackathon winners

[Read more](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/powerplatform/agent-academy-hackathon-winners?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

Govind Kamtamneni  •  June 18, 2026

##### Outcome-driven learning systems: enterprise RL with OpenEnv and Foundry

[Read more](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/foundry/outcome-driven-learning-systems-enterprise-rl-with-openenv-and-foundry?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

Jacques van Rhyn  •  June 18, 2026

##### DX Dump Files (Preview)

[Read more](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/directx/dx-dump-files-preview?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

### Events

## Attend events, or watch on demand

[More community events](https://developers.microsoft.com/en-us/community#events)

[Skip carousel Events](https://developers.microsoft.com/#events-carousel) Showing 1-2 of 5 slides

Previous slide Next slide

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [Designing Effective and Accessible Reports in Power BI with Matt Mair-Durrant](https://www.meetup.com/microsoftdataplatformbirmingham/events/315380355/)

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [A Python & A Viking warlord: how computer stuff got named | PGHDOTNET](https://www.meetup.com/dotnet-virtual-user-group/events/315442977/)

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [A Python & A Viking warlord: How computer stuff got named?](https://www.meetup.com/pghdotnet/events/315442799/)

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [Microsoft Build 2026 Summary](https://www.meetup.com/metro-toronto-azure-community/events/314669564/)

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [8Microsoft Build 2026 Summary](https://www.meetup.com/toronto-azure-community/events/315455870/)

[Back to carousel navigation controls](https://developers.microsoft.com/#events-carousel-controls)

 

## Microsoft.Source newsletter

Get the latest articles, documentation, and events from Microsoft.Source—the curated monthly developer community newsletter. Learn about new technologies and find opportunities to connect with other developers.

[Sign up today](https://info

Search

Microsoft Build 2026  –  Explore the latest announcements, sessions, and technical demos from Build

[Watch on demand](https://build.microsoft.com/en-US/sessions)

### Microsoft Developer

# Connect, code, and grow

Developer communities, tools, and resources for solving the problems of today and building the innovations of tomorrow.

[Menu]()

- [Featured products](https://developer.microsoft.com/#featured-products)
- [News and updates](https://developer.microsoft.com/#news-and-updates)
- [Languages](https://developer.microsoft.com/#languages)
- [Communities](https://developer.microsoft.com/#communities)
- [Hubs](https://developer.microsoft.com/#hubs)
- [Developer story](https://developer.microsoft.com/#developer-story)
- [Blogs](https://developer.microsoft.com/#blogs)
- [Events](https://developer.microsoft.com/#events)
- [Learn](https://developer.microsoft.com/#learn)

### Featured Products

## The tools you love – any platform and any language

Microsoft 365 Azure Visual Studio Windows

Previous

Next

 

##### Gain full access to productivity tools

Get exclusive resources and community support for building people-centric, cross-platform productivity experiences that extend Microsoft 365.

[Go to the Developer Program](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/dev-program)

 

##### Documentation

Learn how to build a collaborative app or extend your Microsoft 365 app.

[Visit docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/microsoft-365/developer/?wt.mc_id=devcom_m365docs_webpage_cnl)

 

##### Code samples

Get hands-on with Microsoft 365 code samples and start building applications today.

[Explore code](https://learn.microsoft.com/samples/browse/?terms=microsoft-365&wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Build in the Cloud

Turn your ideas into solutions with Microsoft cloud services. Visit the Azure Developers Hub to learn how to build how you want and deploy where you want.

[Go to the Azure Developer Hub](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/azure)

 

##### Documentation

Learn how to build and manage powerful applications using Microsoft Azure cloud services.

[Visit docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/?wt.mc_id=devcom_azuredocs_webpage_cnl)

 

##### Code samples

Filter thousands of Azure code samples by language to find what you need.

[Explore code](https://learn.microsoft.com/samples/browse/?products=azure&wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Code faster, work smarter with Visual Studio

Build any type of application. Work together in real time. Diagnose and stop problems before they happen. Use your favorite language to deliver apps and services on any platform, any device.

[Go to the Visual Studio home page](https://visualstudio.microsoft.com/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Documentation

Learn how to use Visual Studio Code and code faster with AI.

[Visit docs](https://code.visualstudio.com/Docs?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Code samples

Filter thousands of VS Code code samples by language to find what you need.

[Explore code](https://learn.microsoft.com/samples/browse/?products=vs-code&wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Develop for the desktop with Windows

Build experiences that reach users everywhere. The Windows Dev Center can show you how.

[Go to the Windows Dev Center](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/)

 

##### Documentation

Learn how to design, develop, and deploy apps and solutions for Windows PCs and other devices.

[Visit docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/windows/apps/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

##### Code samples

Filter thousands of samples by language to find what you need.

[Explore code](https://learn.microsoft.com/samples/browse/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

[Skip Banner carousel](https://developer.microsoft.com/#banner-carousel) Showing slide 1 of 3

Previous slide Next slide

 

#### New MCP-Powered AI Travel Agents Sample

The AI Travel Agents is a robust enterprise application (hosted on ACA) that leverages MCP and multiple LlamaIndex AI agents to enhance travel agency operations.

[Explore the GitHub repository](https://aka.ms/azure-ai-travel-agents)

 

#### Microsoft for Python developers

Build smarter with Python on Microsoft—tools, cloud, and AI at your fingertips.

[Learn more](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/python)

 

#### Windows Dev Center

Learn why every Dev is an AI Dev.

[See what's new](https://developer.microsoft.com/windows/)

[Back to carousel navigation controls](https://developer.microsoft.com/#banner-carousel-controls)

### News and updates

## Discover what's new

[Skip carousel Discover what's new](https://developer.microsoft.com/#discover-whats-new-carousel) Showing 1-2 of 3 slides

Previous slide Next slide

 

##### Microsoft Foundry updates help deploy and run AI agents effectively

At Build 2026, Microsoft Foundry added more of the platform pieces developers need for production agents: runtime, tools, memory, grounding, models, observability, and governance.

[Read more](https://aka.ms/FoundryBuildNews)

 

##### Security Build recap: Agentic SLDC and A365

Learn more about our solutions to help secure your code, secure your agents, and secure your models.

[Read more](https://aka.ms/BUILD_SecurityBlog)

 

##### Introducing Microsoft Scout: Your always-on personal agent

Learn about a new category of agents called Autopilots, always-on agents that work autonomously.

[Read more](https://aka.ms/ProjectLobster-Blog)

[Back to carousel navigation controls](https://developer.microsoft.com/#discover-whats-new-carousel-controls)

### Languages

## Choose your language

Access Microsoft tools, resources, and documentation for the following languages:

 

 

 

 

 

 

### Communities

## Join our communities

[Skip carousel Communities carousel](https://developer.microsoft.com/#communities-carousel) Showing 1-3 of 8 slides

Previous slide Next slide

##### Microsoft Developer Communities

Connect with fellow developers, attend a local user group, find resources to get you started, and discover what's happening in the community.

[Connect](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/community)

##### Azure Tech Groups

Join our Azure tech groups to connect with fellow developers and stay updated on the latest advancements.

[Join](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/azure-tech-groups/)

##### Cloud advocates

Engage and learn from Microsoft's Cloud advocates about Microsoft Cloud + AI platform.

[Learn](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/advocates/)

##### Microsoft Reactor

Microsoft Reactor connects you with the developers and startups that share your goals.

[Explore](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/reactor/)

##### VS Code

Enhance your coding experience with AI-powered features in Visual Studio Code.

[Create](https://code.visualstudio.com/community?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

##### .NET

Connect with millions of developers and stay updated on the latest .NET advancements.

[Connect](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/en-us/platform/community?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

##### GitHub

Join the GitHub Community to ask questions, get answers, and share your expertise with fellow developers.

[Join](https://github.com/community?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

##### Global AI

Our mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more.

[Participate](https://globalai.community/)

[Back to carousel navigation controls](https://developer.microsoft.com/#communities-carousel-controls)

### Hubs

## Visit the Developer resource hubs

 

##### AI

From community to hands-on labs, learn your way and skill up for what's next in AI.

[Start today](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/ai)

 

##### Build APIs

Unlock new development opportunities and resources with APIs.

[Get building](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/build-apis)

 

##### Game development

Create bold, immersive game experiences that attract and engage players.

[Game on](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/games/)

## Hear a developer's story

“We need a pipeline of agents. We need to create specialized agents for each piece of the car.”

— Thiago Lacopini, CEO Kumulus

- [Microsoft Foundry](https://azure.microsoft.com/products/ai-foundry/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)
 
- [Azure](https://azure.microsoft.com/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)
 

## Read our blog

[More blogs](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

Jon Galloway  •  June 8, 2026

##### Microsoft Build 2026 recap: vision, launches, and top sessions

Catch up on Microsoft Build 2026 with a recap of the vision, the major product launches, and the top sessions for developers.

[Read more](https://developer.microsoft.com/blog/build-recap)

#### Recent articles

 

April Dunnam  •  June 18, 2026

##### Agent Academy Hackathon winners

[Read more](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/powerplatform/agent-academy-hackathon-winners?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

Govind Kamtamneni  •  June 18, 2026

##### Outcome-driven learning systems: enterprise RL with OpenEnv and Foundry

[Read more](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/foundry/outcome-driven-learning-systems-enterprise-rl-with-openenv-and-foundry?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

 

Jacques van Rhyn  •  June 18, 2026

##### DX Dump Files (Preview)

[Read more](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/directx/dx-dump-files-preview?wt.mc_id=developermscom)

### Events

## Attend events, or watch on demand

[More community events](https://developer.microsoft.com/en-us/community#events)

[Skip carousel Events](https://developer.microsoft.com/#events-carousel) Showing 1-2 of 5 slides

Previous slide Next slide

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [Designing Effective and Accessible Reports in Power BI with Matt Mair-Durrant](https://www.meetup.com/microsoftdataplatformbirmingham/events/315380355/)

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [A Python & A Viking warlord: how computer stuff got named | PGHDOTNET](https://www.meetup.com/dotnet-virtual-user-group/events/315442977/)

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [A Python & A Viking warlord: How computer stuff got named?](https://www.meetup.com/pghdotnet/events/315442799/)

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [Microsoft Build 2026 Summary](https://www.meetup.com/metro-toronto-azure-community/events/314669564/)

##### Thu, Jul 02

##### [8Microsoft Build 2026 Summary](https://www.meetup.com/toronto-azure-community/events/315455870/)

[Back to carousel navigation controls](https://developer.microsoft.com/#events-carousel-controls)

 

## Microsoft.Source newsletter

Get the latest articles, documentation, and events from Microsoft.Source—the curated monthly developer community newsletter. Learn about new technologies and find opportunities to connect with other developers.

[Sign up today](https://info.microsoft.com/ww-landin

# Build with answers in reach

Dive into official documentation, practical answers, and expert guidance for working and troubleshooting with Microsoft.

 Suggestions will filter as you type

Search

## Popular technical resources and training

- ### Discover AI, Azure, and Copilot essentials
 
 Develop knowledge and skills faster with the latest resources and expert insights.
 
 [Artificial Intelligence](https://api.microsoft.com/ai)
 
 [Azure](https://api.microsoft.com/azure)
 
 [Microsoft Copilot](https://api.microsoft.com/copilot)
 
 [Browse all product documentation](https://api.microsoft.com/docs)
 
- ### Take in-demand training
 
 Advance your technical career with training and verified credentials.
 
 [Microsoft Azure Fundamentals](https://api.microsoft.com/training/courses/ai-900t00)
 
 [Fundamentals of Generative AI](https://api.microsoft.com/training/modules/fundamentals-generative-ai)
 
 [Microsoft Azure Fundamentals: Describe cloud concepts](https://api.microsoft.com/training/paths/microsoft-azure-fundamentals-describe-cloud-concepts)
 
 [Browse all training](https://api.microsoft.com/training/browse/)
 
- ### Additional resources
 
 Ask our developer community tech questions or gain applied skills and verified certifications.
 
 [Ask a question](https://api.microsoft.com/answers)
 
 Join our Q&A tech community to ask questions, share knowledge, and learn together.
 
 [Earn credentials](https://api.microsoft.com/credentials)
 
 Explore credentials including real-world, scenario-based skills and verified, industry-recognized credentials.
 
 [Get student certifications](https://api.microsoft.com/training/student-hub/certifications)
 
 Stand out to hiring managers with a Microsoft Certification and take exams at a discounted student price.
 

## Get started with Microsoft Learn MCP Server

Create a custom agent that uses Learn MCP Server to answer all its users' questions with trusted Microsoft documentation.

[Start building](https://api.microsoft.com/training/support/mcp)

[English (United States)](https://api.microsoft.com/en-us/locale?target=https%3A%2F%2Flearn.microsoft.com%2Fen-us%2F)

[Your Privacy Choices](https://aka.ms/yourcaliforniaprivacychoices)

Theme

- Light
- Dark
- High contrast

- ### Take in-demand training

 Join our Q&A tech community to ask questions, share knowledge, and learn together.

 Explore credentials including real-world, scenario-based skills and verified, industry-recognized credentials.
 
 [Get student certifications](https://microsoft.com/training/student-hub/certifications)
 
 Stand out to hiring managers with a Microsoft Certification and take exams at a discounted student price.

Create a custom agent that uses Learn MCP Server to answer all its users' questions with trusted Microsoft documentation.
